title: crepis coreana
intro: Crepis coreana, also known as Korean dandelion or Korean hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and improving liver function. Crepis coreana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat various conditions.
